name: Nezuko Kamado (Demon slayer)
description: A kind girl turned demon by Muzan Kibutsuji after he slaughters her family, leaving her as one Tanjiro's only surviving relatives; she becomes a demon but retains her humanity, fighting alongside Tanjiro with unique abilities like her powerful Blood Demon Art (Combustible Blood) and extreme regeneration, refusing to harm humans and eventually gaining immunity to the sun, making her crucial in the fight against Muzan.
creator: Locamen
